Title: Market Research for SaaS Product Launch
Brief Description: Conduct comprehensive market research to validate product-market fit for a new project management SaaS tool targeting small to medium businesses.
Background: We're developing a new project management SaaS tool designed specifically for small to medium businesses (SMBs). Before launching, we need to validate the product-market fit, understand customer needs, analyze competitors, and identify the best go-to-market strategy. The research should provide actionable insights to guide product development and marketing decisions.
Objectives: Validate product-market fit and customer demand
Identify target customer segments and personas
Analyze competitive landscape and market positioning
Understand customer pain points and needs
Develop pricing strategy and go-to-market recommendations

Step-by-Step Instructions.instruction:
Research Planning and Methodology: 
 - Define research objectives and key questions 
 - Identify target audience and sampling strategy 
 - Choose research methods (surveys, interviews, focus groups) 
 - Create research timeline and budget 
 - Develop data collection and analysis framework

Secondary Research and Market Analysis: 
 - Analyze industry reports and market data 
 - Research competitor products and positioning 
 - Study market trends and growth projections 
 - Review pricing strategies in the market 
 - Identify market gaps and opportunities

Primary Research - Customer Interviews: 
 - Conduct 20-30 customer interviews with target users 
 - Use structured interview guide with open-ended questions 
 - Record and transcribe interviews for analysis 
 - Identify common pain points and needs 
 - Gather feedback on product concept and features

Survey Research and Data Collection: 
 - Design and distribute online survey to 500+ respondents 
 - Include questions about current tools, pain points, and preferences 
 - Collect demographic and firmographic data 
 - Analyze survey responses and identify patterns 
 - Validate findings from interviews

Data Analysis and Insights Development: 
 - Analyze qualitative and quantitative data 
 - Create customer personas and journey maps 
 - Identify key insights and actionable recommendations 
 - Develop competitive positioning strategy 
 - Create comprehensive research report

Technical Requirements.Research Tools: Survey platforms (SurveyMonkey, Typeform), Interview recording tools
Technical Requirements.Data Analysis: Excel, SPSS, or R for statistical analysis

Quality Standards: Ethical research practices and data privacy
Review Checklist: Research methodology is sound and appropriate
Sample size is adequate for statistical significance
Data collection methods are ethical and compliant
Report is professionally formatted and presented
All research objectives have been addressed
